title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bikanervala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bikanervala:
Bikanervala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala!
